tasks.label: Extract DOCX text
args: Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem; $doc='c:\Users\Cheesecake\Downloads\Check.GalaxyDistribution T&C 4.21.2026.docx'; $zip=[System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::OpenRead($doc); $entry=$zip.Entries | Where-Object { $_.FullName -eq 'word/document.xml' }; $sr=New-Object System.IO.StreamReader($entry.Open()); $xml=$sr.ReadToEnd(); $sr.Close(); $zip.Dispose(); $xml -replace '<[^>]+>',' ' -replace '&','&' -replace '\s+',' ' | Out-File -FilePath 'c:\wamp64\www\galaxyfreewireless\docx_terms_raw.txt' -Encoding utf8; Write-Output 'done'
